acceptance_targets: [chapter_09_F001] Pass if the opening ask, the post-wire voice note, and the later phone call are clearly distinguishable by rhythm and function when read aloud: at least one of the passages anchored at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_09.md:27, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_09.md:261, or snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_09.md:390 contains concrete logistical detail or a self-exposing stumble instead of another soothing imperative, and no two beats reuse the same body-management command pattern. Fail if all three still sound like variations of the same perfectly calibrated caretaker script.

[chapter_09_F002] Pass if the revised passages at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_09.md:29, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_09.md:316, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_09.md:420 read as complete sentences or a meaningfully varied syntax mix, and if the chapter no longer relies on more than two standalone noun-or-number fragment beats for emphasis. Fail if three or more of those cited passages remain isolated fragment hits performing the same rhetorical job.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if the opening ask, the post-wire voice note, and the later phone call are clearly distinguishable by rhythm and function when read aloud: at least one of the passages anchored at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_09.md:27, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_09.md:261, or snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_09.md:390 contains concrete logistical detail or a self-exposing stumble instead of another soothing imperative, and no two beats reuse the same body-management command pattern. Fail if all three still sound like variations of the same perfectly calibrated caretaker script.
findings.problem: Eli's speech keeps returning to the same caretaker-imperative pattern across text, voice note, and phone call. Because the ask scene depends on him feeling both comforting and managing, the repeated 'eat / unclench / put your back against a wall / tell me what you need' rhythm starts to read as one adaptive script instead of three distinct pressure beats, which flattens his voice into mechanical calibration.
findings.rewrite_direction: Differentiate Eli's responses at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_09.md:27, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_09.md:261, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_09.md:279, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_09.md:390 so each medium does separate work. Keep his curated warmth, but let one beat carry concrete logistics or guilty self-exposure, let one beat stay brief and destabilized, and reserve the full body-management comfort routine for only one passage.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if the revised passages at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_09.md:29, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_09.md:316, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_09.md:420 read as complete sentences or a meaningfully varied syntax mix, and if the chapter no longer relies on more than two standalone noun-or-number fragment beats for emphasis. Fail if three or more of those cited passages remain isolated fragment hits performing the same rhetorical job.
findings.problem: The chapter leans on clipped noun-fragment emphasis often enough to become a prose tic. Fragments like 'Thirty-one hundred.' and the later stack 'Rain. Fridge. The tailor's radio.' hit hard once, but by the fourth and fifth recurrence the syntax is doing the same pressure job every time and starts brushing against the constitution's ban on elliptical clipping.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rework the repeated fragment beats at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_09.md:29, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_09.md:31, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_09.md:82, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_09.md:316, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_09.md:420 so at least two of them land through full syntax, fresh rhythm, or sharper sensory continuation rather than isolated noun fragments. Keep one strategic hammer-blow if wanted, but vary the rest so emphasis does not default to the same clipped construction.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into the embarrassing specifics: transfer amounts, body awkwardness, neighborhood petty detail, ugly motives, and the unstable overlap between care and control. When a choice arises between a safer generalized line and a sharper socially revealing one, choose the sharper line unless it breaks character truth.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If a scene reaches sex, money shame, betrayal, or bodily disgust and the prose flinches into summary or tasteful fog, revise toward concrete action, sensory residue, and social consequence.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: high - contractions are normal in almost all spoken English here; full forms are reserved for emphasis, class performance, or moments of deliberate control.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Alternate compressed one-scene chapters with socially dense multi-scene chapters; follow hot chapters with quiet domestic ones, let comic humiliation sit beside grief, and vary dialogue density so no two consecutive chapters share the same pulse.
prose_style_profile.diction: Contemporary, unsanitized, class-attentive English with enough lyric lift to surprise but not enough polish to float above the bodies and bills in the room.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: tight third person centered on Lena, with no head-hopping; June and Eli are knowable only through what Lena hears, sees, infers, and later uncovers in artifacts.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Supple, pressure-sensitive sentences that can hold embarrassment and desire in the same line, then snap short at moments of exposure or financial pain.
